body.div:
flowchart TD U[Users / Tools / Agents / CI-CD / Automation] --> E[Microsoft Entra ID] E --> APIM[Azure API Management optional] APIM --> G[Gateway Service - Container Apps]
G --> RC{Redis cache hit?} RC -->|Yes| R[Return scoped context bundle] RC -->|No| IDX[Index / Standards Services]
IDX --> CDB[Cosmos DB Vector Search + Metadata + Source Pointers] CDB --> CONN[Connector Layer]
CONN --> GH[GitHub] CONN --> ADO[Azure DevOps] CONN --> CONF[Confluence] CONN --> SP[SharePoint]
GH --> SRC[Authoritative source content] ADO --> SRC CONF --> SRC SP --> SRC
SRC --> BLOB[Blob Storage cache/artifacts] BLOB --> ASM[Bundle Assembly + Governance] ASM --> REDIS[Redis Semantic Cache] REDIS --> R
SB[Azure Service Bus] --> WK[Worker Services] WK --> CDB WK --> BLOB WK --> REDIS WK --> CONN
